CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $4,800.00 FILED BY MISTRY KANTILAL MISTRY RAMAN AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LI WILLIAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-06-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
INVALID POS FILED TO LI, WILLIAM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LI WILLIAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MISTRY KANTILAL $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,015.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
